response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across many languages and domains, but lacks the core requirements for this role: no recent professional C++ development (only a brief stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no fixed income or capital markets/investment banking domain exposure. The skill set centers on web, TypeScript/Node.js, and DLang rather than C++ on Windows for financial systems.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and testing focus
Broad multi-language experience including some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Excellent communication demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: No recent C++ professional experience; only ~6 months over a decade ago
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server/Oracle or Windows-platform development background

key_factors.factor: Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows stack
